item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence and says not to add the treatment-position field as a normal template field. It names the three previous downstream field additions and interprets the pattern as a structural workflow/source-of-truth problem rather than missing fields. It proposes an upstream consolidated recruiting confirmation checklist with owners, deadlines, and escalation path. The temporary emergency field is tightly bounded and excluded from the template baseline, so it does not constitute the fail signal of simply adding the next field."}
